G3546.strongs_def: what is reckoned as of value (after the Latin numisma), i.e. current coin

G3542.derivation: feminine from the same as G3551 (νόμος);
G3542.strongs_def: pasture, i.e. (the act) feeding (figuratively, spreading of a gangrene), or (the food) pasturage

G3552.strongs_def: to be sick, i.e. (by implication, of a diseased appetite) to hanker after (figuratively, to harp upon)

G3517.derivation: apparently from a derivative of the base of G3491 (ναῦς) (meaning wet);

G3540.strongs_def: a perception, i.e. purpose, or (by implication) the intellect, disposition, itself

G3528.kjv_def: conquer, overcome, prevail, get the victory

G3504.derivation: from G3501 (νέος) and a derivative of G5453 (φύω);
G3504.strongs_def: newly planted, i.e. (figuratively) a young convert ("neophyte")

G3531.strongs_def: a Nicolaite, i.e. adherent of Nicolaus

G3560.strongs_def: to put in mind, i.e. (by implication) to caution or reprove gently

G3594.strongs_def: to show the way (literally or figuratively (teach))

G3533.strongs_def: victorious city; Nicopolis, a place in Macedonia

G3516.derivation: from an obsolete particle (implying negation) and G2031 (ἔπος);
G3516.strongs_def: not speaking, i.e. an infant (minor); figuratively, a simple-minded person, an immature Christian

G3551.derivation: from a primary (to parcel out, especially food or grazing to animals);
G3551.strongs_def: law (through the idea of prescriptive usage), genitive case (regulation), specially, (of Moses (including the volume); also of the Gospel), or figuratively (a principle)

G3529.strongs_def: conquest (abstractly), i.e. (figuratively) the means of success

G3592.strongs_def: the same, i.e. this or that one (plural these or those); often used as a personal pronoun

G3586.derivation: from another form of the base of G3582 (ξέστης);
G3586.strongs_def: timber (as fuel or material); by implication, a stick, club or tree or other wooden article or substance

G3515.strongs_def: to act as a babe, i.e. (figuratively) innocently

G3549.strongs_def: to legislate, i.e. (passively) to have (the Mosaic) enactments injoined, be sanctioned (by them)

G3511.derivation: from a form of G3485 (ναός) and (to sweep);
G3511.strongs_def: a temple-servant, i.e. (by implication) a votary

G3562.derivation: adverb from a comparative of the accusative case of G3563 (νοῦς) and G2192 (ἔχω);
G3562.strongs_def: in a mind-having way, i.e. prudently

G3570.derivation: a prolonged form of G3568 (νῦν) for emphasis;

G3538.strongs_def: to cleanse (especially the hands or the feet or the face); ceremonially, to perform ablution

G3523.derivation: from the inseparable negative particle (not) and G2068 (ἐσθίω);
G3523.strongs_def: not eating, i.e. abstinent from food (religiously)

G3565.derivation: from a primary but obsolete verb (to veil as a bride;
G3565.strongs_def: compare Latin "nupto," to marry); a young married woman (as veiled), including a betrothed girl; by implication, a son's wife

G3582.strongs_def: by implication, (of friction) to boil or heat); a vessel (as fashioned or for cooking) (or perhaps by corruption from the Latin sextarius, the sixth of a modius, i.e. about a pint), i.e. (specially), a measure for liquids or solids, (by analogy, a pitcher)

G3513.derivation: probably an intensive form of G3483 (ναί);
G3513.strongs_def: a particle of attestation (accompanied by the object invoked or appealed to in confirmation); as sure as

G3579.strongs_def: to be a host (passively, a guest); by implication, be (make, appear) strange

G3574.strongs_def: a day-and-night, i.e. full day of twenty-four hours

G3547.strongs_def: an expounder of the (Jewish) law, i.e. a Rabbi

G3573.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G3506 (νεύω);
G3573.strongs_def: to nod, i.e. (by implication) to fall asleep; figuratively, to delay

G3521.strongs_def: abstinence (from lack of food, or voluntary and religious); specially, the fast of the Day of Atonement

G3510.strongs_def: a kidney (plural), i.e. (figuratively) the inmost mind

G3548.strongs_def: legislation (specially, the institution of the Mosaic code)

G3587.derivation: from a derivative of the same as G3586 (ξύλον) (meaning a razor);

G3545.derivation: adverb from a derivative of G3551 (νόμος);
G3545.strongs_def: legitimately (specially, agreeably to the rules of the lists)

G3578.strongs_def: hospitality, i.e. (by implication) a place of entertainment

G3580.derivation: from a compound of G3581 (ξένος) and G1209 (δέχομαι);

G3561.derivation: feminine of a compound of G3501 (νέος) and G3376 (μήν) (as noun by implication, of G2250 (ἡμέρα));

G3536.strongs_def: a Ninevite, i.e. inhabitant of Nineveh

G3535.strongs_def: Ninevi (i.e. Nineveh), the capital of Assyria

G3584.derivation: from the base of G3582 (ξέστης) (through the idea of scorching);
G3584.strongs_def: arid; by implication, shrunken, earth (as opposed to water)

G3583.strongs_def: to desiccate; by implication, to shrivel, to mature
G3583.kjv_def: dry up, pine away, be ripe, wither (away)

G3508.strongs_def: Nephthaleim (i.e. Naphthali), a tribe in Palestine

G3591.derivation: probably from the same as G43 (ἀγκάλη);
G3591.strongs_def: a mass (as bending or bulging by its load), i.e. burden (hindrance)

G3598.strongs_def: a road; by implication, a progress (the route, act or distance); figuratively, a mode or means

G3525.strongs_def: to abstain from wine (keep sober), i.e. (figuratively) be discreet

G3550.derivation: from G3551 (νόμος) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);

G3563.derivation: probably from the base of G1097 (γινώσκω);
G3563.strongs_def: the intellect, i.e. mind (divine or human; in thought, feeling, or will); by implication, meaning

G3581.strongs_def: foreign (literally, alien, or figuratively, novel); by implication, a guest or (vice-versa) entertainer

G3599.derivation: perhaps from the base of G2068 (ἐσθίω);

G3568.derivation: a primary particle of present time;
G3568.strongs_def: "now" (as adverb of date, a transition or emphasis); also as noun or adjective present or immediate
G3568.kjv_def: henceforth, + hereafter, of late, soon, present, this (time)

G3501.derivation: including the comparative ; a primary word;
G3501.strongs_def: "new", i.e. (of persons) youthful, or (of things) fresh; figuratively, regenerate

G3539.strongs_def: to exercise the mind (observe), i.e. (figuratively) to comprehend, heed

G3588.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)
G3588.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc

G3530.strongs_def: victorious among his people; Nicodemus, an Israelite

G3557.strongs_def: to sequestrate for oneself, i.e. embezzle

G3558.strongs_def: the south(-west) wind; by extension, the southern quarter itself

G3544.strongs_def: according (or pertaining) to law, i.e. legal (ceremonially); as noun, an expert in the (Mosaic) law

G3532.strongs_def: victorious over the people; Nicolaus, a heretic

G3569.derivation: from neuter plural of G3588 (ὁ) and G3568 (νῦν);
G3569.strongs_def: the things now, i.e. (adverbially) at present

G3564.derivation: probably contracted for a compound of G3565 (νύμφη) and G1435 (δῶρον);

G3559.derivation: from G3563 (νοῦς) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);
G3559.strongs_def: calling attention to, i.e. (by implication) mild rebuke or warning

G3554.strongs_def: a malady (rarely figuratively, of moral disability)

G3543.strongs_def: properly, to do by law (usage), i.e. to accustom (passively, be usual); by extension, to deem or regard

G3512.strongs_def: appertaining to younger persons, i.e. juvenile

G3520.derivation: probably from the base of G3491 (ναῦς);

G3596.derivation: from a compound of G3598 (ὁδός) and G4198 (πορεύομαι);
G3596.strongs_def: to be a wayfarer, i.e. travel
